_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the start-transaction-failures playbook (Branch 3: post-migration provider / type breakage after a Windows-Legacy -> Windows migration). Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key d3a6c4e9-5f70-4c8d-9eaf-3a4b5c6d7e8f --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs e4b7d5fa-6a81-4d9e-8fb0-4b5c6d7e8f90 --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
